value_chain_position: Etch and deposition equipment — critical process steps for 3D NAND stacking, HBM manufacturing, and advanced logic node formation.
relative_comps: Lam dominates the etch market (~50% share) and is the leading deposition tool supplier for 3D NAND; its exposure to memory (NAND/DRAM) makes it more cyclical than ASML but it benefits directly from HBM capacity expansion. Applied Materials is the closest peer at similar scale; KLA leads in process control. Lam's 3-year CAGR is 2%, reflecting the memory capex downcycle, but YoY recovery (+27%) signals the cycle turning. FCF margin of 30% is best-in-class for equipment; trades at ~25x forward earnings vs AMAT at ~22x.
